goal: Restrict agent memory context to trusted sources, route untrusted sources through candidates, add claim/belief governance, and keep retrieval orchestration deterministic and cheap by default.
global_constraints: Do not bypass Django policy, scope or sensitivity checks.
Do not treat safe corpus as automatically trusted source context.
Do not allow candidate_only, quarantined or blocked source content in normal agent memory.search context.
Do not require local LLM calls in hot-path retrieval.
Do not store or return secret values.
Keep runtime-generated data under data/ and temporary agent artifacts under .local/.

notes: Hot-path memory.search remains deterministic and does not call an LLM by default.
Untrusted source evidence remains available for review paths, but direct agent context is trusted-only.
Claim and belief governance is implemented as Django models for the MVP.
